subject: gaussfiltOutlierDetectionCC - error with dautoalign4warp
body:
I've recently set up a Windows 10 workstation, using WSL2 to run Dynamo and 
other linux/unix based processing software. I was attempting to run 
dautoalign4warp, following the teamtomo tutorial using the EMPIAR-10164 
data set. One issue that I am having however, is that the alignment is 
consistently failing at the gaussfiltOutlierDetectionCC.

Example:

Output checking is active for this step.
Cropping 2282 observations performed in 0.25 seconds
parameter not used yet
Starting first iteration
Killed

Was wondering if anyone else has encountered this issue, and if so, has any 
suggestions for how to fix. 

Running this same data set on my Mac workstation works perfectly well, and 
so I don't think it's an issue with the data itself.

Dynamo and it's accompanying packages were installed through SBgrid.
